subject: How to export data to CSV format
body: I need to export my customer data to CSV format for analysis in Excel. I can't find the export option in the dashboard. Is this feature available in my current plan?
answer: The CSV export feature is available in the Reports section. Navigate to Reports > Customer Data > Export. Select your date range and fields, then click 'Export to CSV'. This feature is available in Professional and Enterprise plans. If you're on the Basic plan, you can upgrade to access this feature.

subject: Dashboard widgets not loading
body: When I log into my dashboard, the analytics widgets show a loading spinner indefinitely. This started happening after the latest product update yesterday. I've tried different browsers with the same result.
answer: This was a known issue affecting users with custom dashboard configurations after the v2.5 update. We deployed a hotfix that resolves the widget loading issue. Please clear your browser cache and refresh the page. If the issue persists, try resetting your dashboard layout to default in Settings > Dashboard > Reset Layout.

subject: Integration with Salesforce not syncing
body: Our Salesforce integration stopped syncing contacts 2 days ago. The last successful sync was on March 9th at 2:30 PM. No error messages are displayed in the integration settings page.
answer: The issue was caused by expired OAuth tokens after Salesforce updated their security policies. Reconnected the integration by going to Settings > Integrations > Salesforce > Reconnect. This re-authenticated the connection with updated permissions. All pending contacts have been synced successfully. Set up monitoring alerts for future sync failures.

subject: Request for bulk user import feature
body: We're migrating from another platform and need to import 5000+ users. Currently, the system only allows adding users one at a time or in batches of 50. Is there a way to do a bulk import via CSV?
answer: Yes, bulk user import is available for Enterprise customers. You can access it via Settings > Users > Import Users. Upload a CSV file with columns: email, first_name, last_name, role, department. Maximum 10,000 users per import. We also offer a migration assistance service where our team can help with the import process. Contact your account manager for details.

subject: Mobile app crashes on iOS 17
body: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening on my iPhone 14 Pro running iOS 17.2. It was working fine last week. I've tried reinstalling the app but the issue persists.
answer: This was a compatibility issue with iOS 17.2 related to the new privacy features. We released version 3.1.2 of the mobile app that fixes this crash. Please update the app from the App Store. If you continue to experience issues, try: 1) Restart your device, 2) Check that app has necessary permissions in Settings > Privacy, 3) Contact support with crash logs.
